textPlain:
Here's my version, took about 5 minutes to create inside the ChatGPT web interface. 
https://valine.github.io/vibe-coded-ant-game/I don't know if this game was vibe coded, but it certainly could have been. Most notable thing about this post is probably that vibe coded games are good enough now to fool HN.
It should show you a nude ant when you win, like Eggman.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K0OSfbPJFa4
You should also mention it was made with a templating engine you created! Makes it a lot cooler as a demo!
I see potential for speedrunning since the apples are always in the same position.
Reminds me of Ant for the HP48 calculator, though I have a feeling that was way before your time ;-)https://www.hpcalc.org/details/6681

I mean there's not much of a game really, but I like it for what it is. It's also cute and the controls feel surprisingly snappy. My suggestion would be to try this typical responsive meta tag so the viewport does not scroll: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Guides/Vie...
I like the big head and the smile on the ant
Dude, I didn’t really think about using GitHub pages to make games like this! Thanks for inspiring me today.
I’d like to name my Ant please. Anthony? Or perhaps Antoine. Or maybe even Marie Antoinette. Wow there must be like 20 names that start with Ant.
It must be a slow news day.
I what is the “I mean” for? What are you clarifying?
The Anthology of Bernie SantersBelligerant Santa
It's a Show HN that doesn't appear to be vibe-coded AI slop. I'll take it any day of the week.
